item.title: LEGO Despicable Me Minions and Banana Car Toy Movie Set for 6 Plus Year Old Kids Boys & Girls Fun Small Vehicle Playset Gift for Fans of Creative Building 75580
item.description:
You’ve got LEGO Despicable Me Minions and Banana Car Toy Movie Set for 6 Plus Year Old Kids Boys & Girls Fun Small Vehicle Playset Gift for Fans of Creative Building 75580 at the following link:

ℹ️:

  • More Minions movie toys – There are additional LEGO Despicable Me 4 building toys available (sold separately) for kids who want to collect, combine and customise the Minions fun
  • Fun accessories – Includes Dave’s weight-lifting bar, Secret Agent AVL Tim’s X-ray glasses, Pit Crew Ron’s dirty-nappy-disposal gun and much more
  • Minions gift ideas – This fun movie toy makes a great birthday gift for 6-plus-year-old boys, girls and kids who are fans of Minions and Illumination’s Despicable Me films
  • Creative building set – With a small toy car, 4 Minions figures and loads of tools and gadgets, this Minions toy is full of play possibilities
  • Minion toys – Treat kids who are fans of Illumination’s Despicable Me 4 to this Minions and Banana Car toy for 6-plus-year-old boys and girls
  • Movie toys – Includes a banana vehicle toy for kids with a removable engine, Minions Mel, Pit Crew Ron, secret agent AVL Tim and Mega Minion Dave
  • 3D building guide – Discover instructions in the LEGO Builder app where kids can zoom in and rotate models in 3D, track their progress and save sets

item.title: LEGO Star Wars: The Mandalorian Paz Vizsla and Moff Gideon Battle Collectible Building Toy for Kids Age 7+
item.description:
There’s a deal LEGO Star Wars: The Mandalorian Paz Vizsla and Moff Gideon Battle Collectible Building Toy for Kids Age 7+ here:

ℹ️:

  • Accessories – A heavy blaster for Paz Vizsla, a jetpack for Moff Gideon, weapons for the Praetorian Guards, plus a box containing a thermal detonator
  • Build and connect – The Mandalorian base in this LEGO Star Wars: The Mandalorian collectible set connects to the buildable rock/cave in the (75373) Ambush on Mandalore Battle Pack, sold separately
  • Star Wars: The Mandalorian gift idea for kids – This LEGO creative toy makes an out-of-this-world birthday gift for 7+-year-old boys, girls and any young Star Wars: The Mandalorian fan
  • LEGO Star Wars set – The base in this set has an armoured door with a slam-shut trigger and control panels, plus a rotating, stud-shooting turret
  • LEGO Star Wars buildable toy – Relive a scene from Star Wars: The Mandalorian Season 3 with this Paz Vizsla and Moff Gideon Battle set
  • 4 collectible LEGO Star Wars: The Mandalorian minifigures – Characters Paz Vizsla, Moff Gideon and 2 Imperial Praetorian Guards
  • Interactive digital building – Using the LEGO Builder app, kids can zoom in, rotate and visualise a digital version of this model as they build

🛒 Buy it now!!

item.description:

ℹ️:

  • Easy-care home or office decor – Add a self-sufficient splash of colour to any space with this buildable, zero-maintenance artificial flower
  • Part of the LEGO Botanical Collection – Discover a space for relaxation with the wide range of LEGO construction sets designed specifically for adults
  • A thoughtful gift idea – The LEGO Botanicals Plum Blossom model kit for adults makes a great Mothers Day gift or birthday present for women who are fans of LEGO building sets and faux flowers
  • Includes digital building instructions – The LEGO Builder app features a digital version of the building instructions included with this set
  • Detailed LEGO flower – This LEGO interpretation of a plum blossom plant comes with an elegant woody stem and vivid red-and-magenta flowers
  • Creative building – This building set for adults features a plum blossom flower and a pastel-blue pot with a golden band and wood-effect plinth
  • LEGO flower set for adults – Take time out or join friends and family for a relaxing building experience with the LEGO Botanicals Plum Blossom flower set

  • CREATIVE ROLE PLAY – The Peppa Pig figures can hide in the trunk or relax in the branches of the tree house toy, which also features a hinged window
  • EDUCATIONAL TOY FOR KIDS – LEGO DUPLO toddler toys support fine motor skills and emotional development through fun-filled playtimes that make learning fun
  • PACKED WITH PLAY STARTERS – This building toy comes with Peppa Pig and her brother George figures, a watering can, gardening fork, packet of seeds and a tree house toy
  • GIFT FOR TODDLERS – Treat a fan of the Peppa Pig TV show with this building toy, which makes a fun Peppa Pig-themed birthday gift for 2+ year old girls and boys
  • TODDLER LEARNING TOYS – Nurture kids’ caring instincts as they help flowers grow with the LEGO DUPLO Peppa Pig Garden and Tree House toy for 2+ year old girls and boys

item.description:

  • Super Hero playset – Groot’s head turns, his arms are posable, and the pot includes a built-in storage compartment for all the accessories
  • Guardians of the Galaxy gift – Treat fans of Marvel’s Groot, Super Heroes and buildable LEGO toys to this interactive playset, which makes a fun Marvel-themed gift for 10-plus-year-old boys and girls
  • Dancing Super Hero – Includes a buildable Groot figure in a flower pot, 3 different nameplates plus headphones, sunglasses and extra leaves
  • More LEGO Marvel playsets – The extensive range of LEGO Marvel building toys puts an ever-changing universe of imaginative Super Hero adventures into kids’ hands
  • 3D building instructions – With the LEGO Builder app, builders can zoom in and rotate models in 3D, track their progress and save virtual sets
  • Buildable Groot animated toy for kids – Dancing Groot is an interactive building toy for 10-plus-year-old boys and girls
